result.description: Chandler Simpson flies out to left fielder Angel Martínez.
Junior Caminero grounds out, third baseman Daniel Schneemann to first baseman Kyle Manzardo.
Jonathan Aranda grounds out to first baseman Kyle Manzardo.
Steven Kwan lines out to center fielder Cedric Mullins.
Chase DeLauter singles on a line drive to center fielder Cedric Mullins.
José Ramírez grounds out softly to first baseman Jonathan Aranda. Chase DeLauter to 2nd.
Kyle Manzardo strikes out swinging.
Yandy Díaz grounds out, second baseman Travis Bazzana to first baseman Kyle Manzardo.
Jake Fraley grounds out, third baseman Daniel Schneemann to first baseman Kyle Manzardo.
Cedric Mullins lines out sharply to center fielder Steven Kwan.
Daniel Schneemann singles on a fly ball to right fielder Jake Fraley.
Angel Martínez grounds out, second baseman Richie Palacios to first baseman Jonathan Aranda. Daniel Schneemann to 2nd.
Travis Bazzana grounds out, second baseman Richie Palacios to first baseman Jonathan Aranda. Daniel Schneemann to 3rd.
Bo Naylor grounds out to first baseman Jonathan Aranda.
Richie Palacios bunt grounds out softly, pitcher Gavin Williams to first baseman Kyle Manzardo.
Hunter Feduccia hit by pitch.
Taylor Walls strikes out swinging.
Chandler Simpson singles on a line drive to left fielder Angel Martínez. Hunter Feduccia to 2nd.
Junior Caminero called out on strikes.
Brayan Rocchio singles on a ground ball to shortstop Taylor Walls.
Steven Kwan grounds out to first baseman Jonathan Aranda. Brayan Rocchio to 3rd.
Chase DeLauter walks.
José Ramírez reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by first baseman Jonathan Aranda. Chase DeLauter to 2nd.
Kyle Manzardo out on a sacrifice fly to left fielder Chandler Simpson. Brayan Rocchio scores.
